Year 2038 Problem
Year 2100 Non-Leap Year
[computed: %v] != [correct: 0s]
[computed: %v] != [correct: 12 hours]
[computed: %v] != [correct: 1700265600]
[computed: %v] != [correct: 2252-02-28 ...]
\n15:17:20\n
dtmate conv 25771401s WDhms
dtmate dur "12:00:00" 1h5m10s -u "09:48" -s
dtmate dur now 1h -a -n -r 3
dtmate durmath "45 minutes" "1 hour" -s
dtmate durmath "45 minutes" "1 hour" -s -A
unknown shorthand flag: '1' in -1.5h
unknown shorthand flag: '1' in -1h
unknown shorthand flag: '3' in -30m
unknown shorthand flag: '9' in -90m
use -18000 for -05:00
use 19800 for +05:30
yesterday to tomorrow spans %v, expected 48h
